counter.name: FragConsumed
counter.summary: Fragments consumed by the link reader

counter.name: FragConsumedBytes
counter.summary: Bytes read by the link consumer

counter.name: FragFiltered
counter.summary: Fragments filtered and not consumed

counter.name: FragFilteredBytes
counter.summary: Bytes read by the link consumer that were filtered

counter.name: LinkPollingOverrun
counter.summary: Times the link was overrun while polling

counter.name: FragPollingOverrun
counter.summary: Fragments not processed because the link was overrun while polling

counter.name: LinkReadingOverrun
counter.summary: Times the link was overrun while reading metadata

counter.name: FragReadingOverrun
counter.summary: Fragments not processed because the link was overrun while reading

counter.name: Slow
counter.summary: Times the consumer was detected as slow, rate limiting the producer

int.name: Wait
int.label: Wait (task was runnable but not scheduled)

int.name: User
int.label: User (task was scheduled and executing in user mode)

int.name: System
int.label: System (task was scheduled and executing in kernel mode)

gauge.name: Pid
gauge.summary: Process ID of the tile

gauge.name: Tid
gauge.summary: Thread ID of the tile. Same as Pid in production, but might differ in development

gauge.name: LastCpu
gauge.summary: Index of the CPU last executed on

counter.name: ContextSwitchInvoluntary
counter.summary: Involuntary context switches

counter.name: ContextSwitchVoluntary
counter.summary: Voluntary context switches

counter.name: PageFaultMajor
counter.summary: Major page faults

counter.name: PageFaultMinor
counter.summary: Minor page faults

gauge.name: Status
gauge.summary: 0=booting, 1=running, 2=shutdown

gauge.name: HeartbeatTimestampNanos
gauge.summary: Last UNIX timestamp the tile heartbeated, in nanoseconds

gauge.name: InBackpressure
gauge.summary: Whether the tile is currently backpressured, 1 or 0

counter.name: Backpressure
counter.summary: Times the tile waited for one or more consumers to catch up to resume publishing

counter.name: RegimeDurationNanos
counter.summary: Mutually exclusive and exhaustive duration the tile spent in each regime, in nanoseconds

counter.name: CpuDurationNanos
counter.summary: CPU time spent in each CPU regime, in nanoseconds

counter.name: IrqPreempted
counter.summary: Times the tile was interrupted by an IRQ (fixed tiles only)

counter.name: TlbShootdown
counter.summary: TLB shootdowns observed on the tile CPU (fixed tiles only)

counter.name: PktRx
counter.summary: Packets received

counter.name: PktRxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes received (including Ethernet header)

counter.name: PktRxUndersize
counter.summary: Incoming packets dropped due to being too small

counter.name: PktRxFillRingFull
counter.summary: Incoming packets dropped due to fill ring being full

counter.name: PktRxBackpressure
counter.summary: Incoming packets dropped due to backpressure

gauge.name: RxBufferBusy
gauge.summary: Receive buffers currently busy

gauge.name: RxBufferIdle
gauge.summary: Receive buffers currently idle

counter.name: PktTxSubmitted
counter.summary: Packet transmit jobs submitted

counter.name: PktTxCompleted
counter.summary: Packet transmit jobs marked as completed by the kernel

counter.name: PktTxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes transmitted (including Ethernet header)

counter.name: PktTxNoRoute
counter.summary: Packet transmit jobs dropped due to route failure

counter.name: PktTxNoNeighbor
counter.summary: Packet transmit jobs dropped due to unresolved neighbor

counter.name: PktTxRingFull
counter.summary: Packet transmit jobs dropped due to XDP TX ring full or missing completions

gauge.name: TxBufferBusy
gauge.summary: Transmit buffers currently busy

gauge.name: TxBufferIdle
gauge.summary: Transmit buffers currently idle

counter.name: XskSyscallTx
counter.summary: XSK sendto syscalls dispatched

counter.name: XskSyscallRx
counter.summary: XSK recvmsg syscalls dispatched

counter.name: XdpRxOtherDropped
counter.summary: Dropped for other reasons (xdp_statistics_v0.rx_dropped)

counter.name: XdpRxInvalidDescriptor
counter.summary: Dropped due to invalid descriptor (xdp_statistics_v0.rx_invalid_descs)

counter.name: XdpTxInvalidDescriptor
counter.summary: Dropped due to invalid descriptor (xdp_statistics_v0.tx_invalid_descs)

counter.name: XdpRxRingFull
counter.summary: Dropped due to rx ring being full (xdp_statistics_v1.rx_ring_full)

counter.name: XdpRxFillRingEmpty
counter.summary: Failed to retrieve item from fill ring because it was empty (xdp_statistics_v1.rx_fill_ring_empty_descs)

counter.name: XdpTxRingEmpty
counter.summary: Failed to retrieve item from tx ring because it was empty (xdp_statistics_v1.tx_ring_empty_descs)

counter.name: GrePktRx
counter.summary: Valid GRE packets received

counter.name: GrePktRxInvalid
counter.summary: Invalid GRE packets received

counter.name: GrePktRxIgnored
counter.summary: GRE packets received but ignored

counter.name: GrePktTxSubmitted
counter.summary: GRE packet transmit jobs submitted

counter.name: GrePktTxNoRoute
counter.summary: GRE packet transmit jobs dropped due to route failure

counter.name: PktRxSrcInvalid
counter.summary: Incoming packets dropped due to invalid source IP address

counter.name: SyscallTx
counter.summary: sendmmsg syscalls dispatched

counter.name: SyscallRx
counter.summary: recvmmsg syscalls dispatched

counter.name: PktRx
counter.summary: Packets received

counter.name: PktTx
counter.summary: Packets sent

counter.name: PktTxFailed
counter.summary: Packets that failed to send

counter.name: PktTxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes transmitted (including Ethernet header)

counter.name: PktRxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes received (including Ethernet header)

counter.name: TxnOverrun
counter.summary: Txns overrun before reassembled (too small txn_reassembly_count)

counter.name: TxnReassemblyStarted
counter.summary: Fragmented txn receive ops started

gauge.name: TxnReassemblyActive
gauge.summary: Fragmented txn receive ops currently active

counter.name: FragRx
counter.summary: Txn frags received

counter.name: FragGap
counter.summary: Txn frags dropped due to data gap

counter.name: FragDuplicate
counter.summary: Txn frags dropped due to duplicate (stream already completed)

counter.name: TxnRx
counter.summary: Txns received via TPU

counter.name: TxnAbandoned
counter.summary: Txns abandoned because a connection was lost

counter.summary: Txns received via QUIC dropped because they were too small

counter.name: TxnOversize
counter.summary: Txns received via QUIC dropped because they were too large

counter.summary: Packets received on the non-QUIC port that were too small to be a valid IP packet

counter.name: LegacyTxnOversize
counter.summary: Packets received on the non-QUIC port that were too large to be a valid transaction

counter.name: PktTxBytes

int.name: NoFeeInfo
int.label: Bundle dropped due to missing fee info

counter.name: TxnRx
counter.summary: Transactions received, including transactions within bundles

counter.name: PktRx
counter.summary: Packets received

counter.name: ProtobufRxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes from received gRPC protobuf payloads

counter.name: BundleRx
counter.summary: Bundles received

counter.name: ConnError
counter.summary: gRPC errors encountered

gauge.name: HeapSizeBytes
gauge.summary: Workspace heap size

gauge.name: HeapFreeBytes
gauge.summary: Approximate free space in workspace

counter.name: ShredstreamHeartbeatSent
counter.summary: ShredStream heartbeats successfully sent

counter.name: PingAcked
counter.summary: HTTP/2 PINGs acknowledged by server

gauge.name: State
gauge.summary: 0=disconnected, 1=connecting, 2=connected, 3=sleeping

gauge.name: RttSampleNanos
gauge.summary: Latest RTT sample at scrape time, in nanoseconds

gauge.name: RttSmoothedNanos
gauge.summary: RTT moving average, in nanoseconds

gauge.name: RttVarianceNanos
gauge.summary: RTT variance, in nanoseconds

histogram.name: MessageRxDelayNanos
histogram.summary: Message receive delay from bundle server to bundle client, in nanoseconds

gauge.name: TxnPending
gauge.summary: Transactions buffered and waiting to be published

counter.name: TxnBufferFull
counter.summary: Transactions dropped because the pending transaction buffer was full (should never happen)

int.name: BundlePeerFailure
int.label: Peer transaction in the bundle failed

counter.name: TxnResult
counter.summary: Transaction results through verify tile

counter.name: VoteGossipRx
counter.summary: Simple vote transactions received over gossip instead of via the normal TPU path

int.name: BundlePeerFailure
int.label: Peer transaction in the bundle failed

counter.name: TxnResult
counter.summary: Transaction results through dedup tile

counter.name: VoteGossipRx
counter.summary: Simple vote transactions received over gossip instead of via the normal TPU path

int.name: InvalidLookupIndex
int.label: The transaction referenced an index in a LUT that didn't exist

int.name: AccountUninitialized
int.label: The account referenced as a LUT hasn't been initialized

int.name: InvalidAccountData
int.label: The account referenced as a LUT couldn't be parsed

int.name: InvalidAccountOwner
int.label: The account referenced as a LUT wasn't owned by the ALUT program ID

int.name: AccountNotFound
int.label: The account referenced as a LUT couldn't be found

int.name: Inserted
int.label: A transaction with an unknown blockhash was added to the stash

int.name: Overrun
int.label: A transaction with an unknown blockhash was dropped because the stash was full

int.name: Published
int.label: A transaction with an unknown blockhash was published as the blockhash became known

int.name: Removed
int.label: A transaction with an unknown blockhash was removed from the stash without publishing, due to a bad LUT resolved failure, or no bank. These errors are double counted with the respective metrics for those categories

counter.name: TxnNoBank
counter.summary: Transactions dropped because the bank was not available

counter.name: StashOperation
counter.summary: Operations that happened on the transaction stash

counter.name: LutResolved
counter.summary: Address lookup tables resolved

counter.name: BlockhashExpired
counter.summary: Transactions that failed to resolve because the blockhash was expired

counter.name: TxnBundlePeerFailed
counter.summary: Transactions that failed to resolve because a peer transaction in the bundle failed

counter.name: AccdbAccountAcquired
counter.summary: Number of accounts read from the account database (one per address lookup table account fetched), attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountNotFound
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were not found in the account database cache and had to be read from disk, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountWaited
counter.summary: Number of accounts that had to wait for a concurrent writer to publish a disk offset before being read

counter.name: AccdbBatchAcquired
counter.summary: Number of fd_accdb_acquire (batch acquire) calls made by this tile

counter.name: AccdbBytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: AccdbReadOperation
counter.summary: Number of read operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesCopied
counter.summary: Number of bytes copied out of the account database cache on a cache hit

counter.name: TxnNoBank
counter.summary: Transactions dropped because the bank was not available

counter.name: StashOperation
counter.summary: Operations that happened on the transaction stash

counter.name: LutResolved
counter.summary: Address lookup tables resolved

counter.name: BlockhashExpired
counter.summary: Transactions that failed to resolve because the blockhash was expired

counter.name: TxnBundlePeerFailed
counter.summary: Transactions that failed to resolve because a peer transaction in the bundle failed

int.name: InstrAcctCnt
int.label: Transaction has an instruction that references too many accounts

int.name: NonceConflict
int.label: Bundle with two conflicting durable nonce transactions

int.name: AcctBlocklist
int.label: Transaction uses an account on the account blocklist

int.name: BundleBlacklist
int.label: Transaction is a vote in a bundle or uses an account on the bundle blacklist

int.name: InvalidNonce
int.label: Transaction is an invalid durable nonce transaction

int.name: WriteSysvar
int.label: Transaction tries to write to a sysvar

int.name: EstimationFail
int.label: Estimating compute cost and/or fee failed

int.name: DuplicateAccount
int.label: Transaction included an account address twice

int.name: TooManyAccounts
int.label: Transaction tried to load too many accounts

int.name: AddrLut
int.label: Transaction loaded accounts from a lookup table

int.name: Unaffordable
int.label: Fee payer's balance below transaction fee

int.name: Duplicate
int.label: Pack aware of transaction with same signature

int.name: NoncePriority
int.label: Transaction's fee was too low given its compute unit requirement and another competing transactions that uses the same durable nonce

int.name: Priority
int.label: Transaction's fee was too low given its compute unit requirement and other competing transactions

int.name: NonvoteAdd
int.label: Transaction that was not a simple vote added to pending transactions

int.name: VoteAdd
int.label: Simple vote transaction was added to pending transactions

int.name: NonvoteReplace
int.label: Transaction that was not a simple vote replaced a lower priority transaction

int.name: VoteReplace
int.label: Simple vote transaction replaced a lower priority transaction

int.name: NonceNonvoteAdd
int.label: Durable nonce transaction added to pending transactions

int.name: Unused
int.label: Unused because durable nonce transactions can't be simple votes

int.name: NonceNonvoteReplace
int.label: Durable nonce transaction replaced a lower priority transaction, likely one that uses the same durable nonce

int.name: Taken
int.label: Pack included the transaction in the microblock

int.name: CuLimit
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction because it would have exceeded the block CU limit

int.name: FastPath
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction because of account conflicts using the fast bitvector check

int.name: ByteLimit
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction because it would have exceeded the block data size limit

int.name: AllocLimit
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction because it would have exceeded the data allocation limit

int.name: WriteCost
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction because it would have caused a writable account to exceed the per-account block write cost limit

int.name: SlowPath
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction because of account conflicts using the full slow check

int.name: DeferSkip
int.label: Pack skipped the transaction it previously exceeded the per-account block write cost limit too many times

int.name: NoTxnNoExecleNoLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: not leader, no transactions, no available execle

int.name: TxnNoExecleNoLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: not leader, transactions available, no available execle

int.name: NoTxnExecleNoLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: not leader, no transactions, execle available

int.name: TxnExecleNoLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: not leader, transactions available, execle available

int.name: NoTxnNoExecleLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: leader, no transactions, no available execle

int.name: TxnNoExecleLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: leader, transactions available, no available execle

int.name: NoTxnExecleLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: leader, no transactions, execle available

int.name: TxnExecleLeaderNoMicroblock
int.label: No microblock: leader, transactions available, execle available (all conflicting)

int.name: NoTxnNoExecleNoLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: not leader, no transactions, no available execle

int.name: TxnNoExecleNoLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: not leader, transactions available, no available execle

int.name: NoTxnExecleNoLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: not leader, no transactions, execle available

int.name: TxnExecleNoLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: not leader, transactions available, execle available

int.name: NoTxnNoExecleLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: leader, no transactions, no available execle

int.name: TxnNoExecleLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: leader, transactions available, no available execle

int.name: NoTxnExecleLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: leader, no transactions, execle available

int.name: TxnExecleLeaderMicroblock
int.label: Scheduled a microblock: leader, transactions available, execle available

int.name: Conflicting
int.label: Non-votes that write to a hotly-contended account

int.name: Bundles
int.label: Transactions that are part of a bundle

int.name: NotNeeded
int.label: On-chain state in the correct state

int.name: Inserted
int.label: Inserted an initializer bundle to update the on-chain state

int.name: CreationFailed
int.label: Tried to insert an initializer bundle to update the on-chain state, but creation failed

int.name: InsertionFailed
int.label: Tried to insert an initializer bundle to update the on-chain state, but insertion failed

histogram.name: ScheduleMicroblockDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of scheduling one microblock

histogram.name: NoScheduleMicroblockDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of discovering that there are no schedulable transactions

histogram.name: InsertTransactionDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of inserting one transaction into the pool of available transactions

histogram.name: CompleteMicroblockDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of the computation associated with marking one microblock as complete

histogram.name: TxnPerMicroblock
histogram.summary: Transactions in a scheduled microblock, including both votes and non-votes

histogram.name: VotePerMicroblock
histogram.summary: Simple vote transactions in a scheduled microblock

counter.name: TxnNormalRx
counter.summary: Transactions received via the normal TPU path

counter.name: TxnInserted
counter.summary: Result of inserting a transaction into the pack object

counter.name: StateDurationNanos
counter.summary: Time spent in each state, in nanoseconds

counter.name: TxnExtraDropped
counter.summary: Transactions dropped from the extra transaction storage because it was full

counter.name: TxnExtraInserted
counter.summary: Transactions inserted into the extra transaction storage because pack's primary storage was full

counter.name: TxnExtraRetrieved
counter.summary: Transactions pulled from the extra transaction storage and inserted into pack's primary storage

counter.name: TxnExpired
counter.summary: Transactions deleted from pack because their TTL expired

counter.name: TxnDeleted
counter.summary: Transactions dropped from pack because they were requested to be deleted

counter.name: TxnAlreadyExecuted
counter.summary: Transactions dropped from pack because they were already executed (in either the replay or leader pipeline)

counter.name: TxnPartialBundle
counter.summary: Transactions dropped from pack because they were part of a partial bundle

gauge.name: TxnAvailable
gauge.summary: Pending transactions in pack's pool that are available to be scheduled

gauge.name: TxnPendingCapacity
gauge.summary: Maximum number of pending transactions that pack can consider. Fixed at Firedancer startup but a useful reference for TxnAvailable

gauge.name: TxnPendingSmallestCu
gauge.summary: Lower bound on the smallest non-vote transaction (in cost units) that is immediately available for scheduling

counter.name: MicroblockPerBlockLimitReached
counter.summary: Times pack did not pack a microblock because the microblocks-per-block limit had been reached

counter.name: DataPerBlockLimitReached
counter.summary: Times pack did not pack a microblock because it reached the data per block limit at the start of trying to schedule a microblock

counter.name: TxnScheduled
counter.summary: Result of trying to consider a transaction for scheduling

counter.name: BundleCrankResult
counter.summary: Result of considering whether bundle cranks are needed

gauge.name: BlockCuConsumed
gauge.summary: Cost units consumed in the current block, or 0 if pack is not currently packing a block

histogram.name: CuScheduledPerBlock
histogram.summary: Cost units scheduled for each block pack produced. Can be higher than the block limit because of returned CUs

histogram.name: CuRebatedPerBlock
histogram.summary: Compute units rebated for each block pack produced. Compute units are rebated when a transaction fails prior to execution or requests more compute units than it uses

histogram.name: CuNetPerBlock
histogram.summary: Net cost units (scheduled - rebated) in each block pack produced

histogram.name: CuPct
histogram.summary: Percent of the total block cost limit used for each block pack produced

counter.name: TxnDeleteMissed
counter.summary: Attempts to delete a transaction that wasn't found

counter.name: TxnDeleteHit
counter.summary: Attempts to delete a transaction that was found and deleted

int.name: AccountInUse
int.label: An account is already being processed in another transaction in a way that does not support parallelism

int.name: AccountLoadedTwice
int.label: A `Pubkey` appears twice in the transaction's `account_keys`. Instructions can reference `Pubkey`s more than once but the message must contain a list with no duplicate keys

int.name: AccountNotFound
int.label: Attempt to debit an account but found no record of a prior credit

int.name: ProgramAccountNotFound
int.label: Attempt to load a program that does not exist

int.name: InsufficientFundsForFee
int.label: The fee payer `Pubkey` does not have sufficient balance to pay the fee to schedule the transaction

int.name: InvalidAccountForFee
int.label: This account may not be used to pay transaction fees

int.name: AlreadyProcessed
int.label: The bank has seen this transaction before. This can occur under normal operation when a UDP packet is duplicated, as a user error from a client not updating its `recent_blockhash`, or as a double-spend attack

int.name: BlockhashNotFound
int.label: The bank has not seen the given `recent_blockhash` or the transaction is too old and the `recent_blockhash` has been discarded

int.name: InstructionError
int.label: An error occurred while processing an instruction

int.name: CallChainTooDeep
int.label: Loader call chain is too deep

int.name: MissingSignatureForFee
int.label: Transaction requires a fee but has no signature present

int.name: InvalidAccountIndex
int.label: Transaction contains an invalid account reference

int.name: SignatureFailure
int.label: Transaction did not pass signature verification

int.name: InvalidProgramForExecution
int.label: This program may not be used for executing instructions

int.name: SanitizeFailure
int.label: Transaction failed to sanitize accounts offsets correctly implies that account locks are not taken for this TX, and should not be unlocked

int.name: ClusterMaintenance
int.label: Transactions are currently disabled due to cluster maintenance

int.name: AccountBorrowOutstanding
int.label: Transaction processing left an account with an outstanding borrowed reference

int.name: WouldExceedMaxBlockCostLimit
int.label: Transaction would exceed max Block Cost Limit

int.name: InvalidWritableAccount
int.label: Transaction loads a writable account that cannot be written

int.name: WouldExceedMaxAccountCostLimit
int.label: Transaction would exceed max account limit within the block

int.name: WouldExceedAccountDataBlockLimit
int.label: Transaction would exceed account data limit within the block

int.name: InvalidAddressLookupTableOwner
int.label: Attempted to lookup addresses from an account owned by the wrong program

int.name: InvalidAddressLookupTableData
int.label: Attempted to lookup addresses from an invalid account

int.name: InvalidAddressLookupTableIndex
int.label: Address table lookup uses an invalid index

int.name: InvalidRentPayingAccount
int.label: Transaction leaves an account with a lower balance than rent-exempt minimum

int.name: WouldExceedMaxVoteCostLimit
int.label: Transaction would exceed max Vote Cost Limit

int.name: WouldExceedAccountDataTotalLimit
int.label: Transaction would exceed total account data limit

int.name: DuplicateInstruction
int.label: Transaction contains a duplicate instruction that is not allowed

int.name: InsufficientFundsForRent
int.label: Transaction results in an account with insufficient funds for rent

int.name: MaxLoadedAccountsDataSizeExceeded
int.label: Transaction exceeded max loaded accounts data size cap

int.name: InvalidLoadedAccountsDataSizeLimit
int.label: LoadedAccountsDataSizeLimit set for transaction must be greater than 0

int.name: ResanitizationNeeded
int.label: Sanitized transaction differed before/after feature activation. Needs to be resanitized

int.name: ProgramExecutionTemporarilyRestricted
int.label: Program execution is temporarily restricted on an account

int.name: UnbalancedTransaction
int.label: The total balance before the transaction does not equal the total balance after the transaction

int.name: ProgramCacheHitMaxLimit
int.label: The total program cache size hit the maximum allowed limit

int.name: CommitCancelled
int.label: The process for committing the transaction was cancelled internally

int.name: BundlePeer
int.label: Transaction is part of a bundle and one of the peer transactions failed

int.name: InstructionError
int.label: An error occurred while processing an instruction

int.name: AccountNotFound
int.label: The transaction fee payer address was not found

int.name: ProgramAccountNotFound
int.label: A program account referenced by the transaction was not found

int.name: InsufficientFundsForFee
int.label: The transaction fee payer did not have balance to pay the fee

int.name: InvalidAccountForFee
int.label: The transaction fee payer account is not owned by the system program, or has data that is not a nonce

int.name: AlreadyProcessed
int.label: The transaction has already been processed in a recent block

int.name: BlockhashNotFound
int.label: The transaction references a blockhash that is not recent, or advances a nonce with the wrong value

int.name: InvalidProgramForExecution
int.label: A program account referenced by the transaction was no executable. TODO: No longer needed with SIMD-0162

int.name: AddressLookupTableNotFound
int.label: The transaction references an ALUT account that does not exist or is inactive

int.name: InvalidAddressLookupTableOwner
int.label: The transaction references an ALUT account that is not owned by the ALUT program account

int.name: InvalidAddressLookupTableData
int.label: The transaction references an ALUT account that contains data which is not a valid ALUT

int.name: InvalidAddressLookupTableIndex
int.label: The transaction references an account offset from the ALUT which does not exist

int.name: MaxLoadedAccountsDataSizeExceeded
int.label: The total account data size of the loaded accounts exceeds the consensus limit

int.name: DuplicateInstruction
int.label: A compute budget program instruction was invoked more than once

int.name: InvalidLoadedAccountsDataSizeLimit
int.label: The compute budget program was invoked and set the loaded accounts data size to zero

int.name: NonceAlreadyAdvanced
int.label: The transaction references a nonce account that is already advanced

int.name: NonceAdvanceFailed
int.label: The transaction is a nonce transaction but the advance instruction was not valid or failed

int.name: NonceWrongBlockhash
int.label: The transaction is a nonce transaction but the blockhash is not the correct one

int.name: SanitizeFailure
int.label: The process for sanitizing the transaction failed

int.name: AccountInUse
int.label: The transaction conflicts with another transaction in the microblock. TODO: No longer possible with smart dispatcher

int.name: AccountLoadedTwice
int.label: The transaction references the same account twice

int.name: SignatureFailure
int.label: The transaction had an invalid signature

int.name: TooManyAccountLocks
int.label: The transaction references too many accounts. TODO: No longer possible with smart dispatcher

int.name: InsufficientFundsForRent
int.label: The transaction would leave an account with a lower balance than the rent-exempt minimum

int.name: UnbalancedTransaction
int.label: The total referenced account lamports before and after the transaction was unbalanced

int.name: BundlePeer
int.label: The transaction was part of a bundle and an earlier transaction in the bundle failed

int.name: LandedFeesOnly
int.label: Transaction landed, but was fees only and did not execute

int.name: LandedFailed
int.label: Transaction landed, but failed to execute

counter.name: TxnResult
counter.summary: Result of loading and executing a transaction

counter.name: TxnLanded
counter.summary: Whether a transaction landed in the block or not

counter.name: CuExecuted
counter.summary: Estimated compute units executed since tile start

counter.name: TxnRegimeDurationNanos
counter.summary: Mutually exclusive and exhaustive duration spent in transaction execution regimes, in nanoseconds

counter.name: VmRegimeDurationNanos
counter.summary: Mutually exclusive and exhaustive duration spent in virtual machine execution regimes, in nanoseconds

counter.name: AccdbAccountAcquired
counter.summary: Number of accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountWritableAcquired
counter.summary: Number of writable accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountEvicted
counter.summary: Number of accounts evicted from the account database cache to make space, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedNew
counter.summary: Number of new (non-overwrite) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedOverwrite
counter.summary: Number of overwrite (existing fork+generation) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountNotFound
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were not found in the account database cache, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountWaited
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were concurrently loading into cache by another transaction, causing the transaction to wait

counter.name: AccdbBatchAcquired
counter.summary: Number of fd_accdb_acquire (batch acquire) calls made by this tile

counter.name: AccdbAcquireFailed
counter.summary: Number of times we failed to acquire the cache lines needed for a transaction, and had to spin loop waiting

counter.name: AccdbBytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: AccdbReadOperation
counter.summary: Number of read operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesWritten
counter.summary: Number of bytes written to the account database

counter.name: AccdbWriteOperation
counter.summary: Number of write operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesCopied
counter.summary: Number of bytes copied within the account database

counter.name: TxnSanitizeFailed
counter.summary: Transactions that failed to sanitize

counter.name: TxnNotExecutedFailed
counter.summary: Transactions that did not execute. Different from transactions that fail to execute, which make it onto the chain

counter.name: TxnLoadAddressTable
counter.summary: Result of loading address lookup tables for a transaction. If there are multiple errors for the transaction, only the first one is reported

counter.name: TxnResult
counter.summary: Result of loading and executing a transaction

counter.name: TxnProcessingFailed
counter.summary: Transactions for which the processing stage failed and won't land on chain

counter.name: TxnFeeOnly
counter.summary: Transactions that will land on chain but without executing

counter.name: TxnExecuted
counter.summary: Transactions that execute on chain, by outcome

counter.name: TxnCostModelUndercount
counter.summary: Transactions that used more CUs than the cost model should have permitted them to

histogram.name: BeginLeaderDelaySeconds
histogram.summary: Delay between when we become leader in a slot and when we receive the bank

histogram.name: FirstMicroblockDelaySeconds
histogram.summary: Delay between when we become leader in a slot and when we receive the first microblock

histogram.name: SlotDoneDelaySeconds
histogram.summary: Delay between when we become leader in a slot and when we finish the slot

histogram.name: BundleInitializeDelaySeconds
histogram.summary: Delay in starting the slot caused by loading the information needed to generate the bundle crank transactions

int.name: BadSlot
int.label: Shred was for a slot for which we don't know the leader

int.name: Equivocated
int.label: Shred was equivocated with another shred

int.name: Rejected
int.label: Shred was invalid for one of many reasons

int.name: Ignored
int.label: Shred was ignored because we had already reconstructed the FEC set, or was for an old slot

int.name: Duplicate
int.label: Shred was a duplicate of a previously received valid shred of an incomplete FEC set

int.name: Okay
int.label: Shred accepted to an incomplete FEC set

int.name: Completes
int.label: Shred accepted and resulted in a valid, complete FEC set

histogram.name: ContactInfoPerMessage
histogram.summary: Contact infos in the cluster contact info message

counter.name: MicroblockAbandoned
counter.summary: Microblocks abandoned because we switched slots without finishing the current slot

counter.name: BlockIdInvalid
counter.summary: Times a block was created with unknown parent block_id

histogram.name: BatchSizeBytes
histogram.summary: Size of each microblock batch that is shredded, in bytes

histogram.name: MicroblockPerBatch
histogram.summary: Microblocks in each microblock batch that is shredded

histogram.name: ShreddingDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of producing one FEC set from the shredder

histogram.name: AddShredDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of verifying and processing one shred received from the network

counter.name: ShredProcessed
counter.summary: Result of processing a shred from the network

counter.name: FecSpilled
counter.summary: FEC sets spilled because they didn't complete in time and we needed space

counter.name: ShredInitialRejected
counter.summary: Shreds rejected before any resources were allocated for the FEC set

counter.name: ShredUnchainedRejected
counter.summary: Shreds rejected because they're not chained merkle shreds

counter.name: FecFatalRejected
counter.summary: FEC sets rejected for reasons that cause the whole FEC set to become invalid

counter.name: NonceInvalid
counter.summary: Shreds received that seemed to be repair responses but had an incorrect nonce

counter.name: ShredRepairRx
counter.summary: Repair shreds received

counter.name: ShredRepairRxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes received from network packets with repair shreds, including network headers

counter.name: ShredTurbineRx
counter.summary: Turbine shreds received

counter.name: ShredTurbineRxBytes
counter.summary: Bytes received from network packets with turbine shreds, including network headers

counter.name: TxnInserted
counter.summary: Transactions produced while we were leader in the shreds that have been inserted so far

gauge.name: AccountCount
gauge.summary: Total number of accounts currently in the account database

gauge.name: AccountCapacity
gauge.summary: Total capacity of accounts that can be stored in the account database

counter.name: AccountRelocated
counter.summary: Total number of accounts moved in the account database during compaction

gauge.name: DiskAllocatedBytes
gauge.summary: Total allocated size of the account database on disk

gauge.name: DiskCurrentBytes
gauge.summary: Total written-through size of the account database on disk, excluding never-written partition tail space

gauge.name: DiskUsedBytes
gauge.summary: Total size of the account database on disk that is currently used

gauge.name: InCompaction
gauge.summary: 1 if a compaction is currently in progress, 0 if not

counter.name: CompactionRequested
counter.summary: Total number of compactions requested on the account database

counter.name: CompactionCompleted
counter.summary: Total number of compactions fully completed on the account database, less than or equal to the requested amount

counter.name: AccountRelocatedBytes
counter.summary: Total number of bytes moved in the account database during compaction

counter.name: AccountPreevicted
counter.summary: Number of accounts preemptively evicted (written back) from the account database cache by the background preevict pass, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: BytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: BytesWritten
counter.summary: Number of bytes written to the account database

counter.name: WriteOperation
counter.summary: Number of write operations performed on the account database

counter.name: CopyOperation
counter.summary: Number of in-place copy_file_range operations performed on the account database during compaction

counter.name: AccountDeleted
counter.summary: Number of accounts deleted from the account database

gauge.name: CacheClassUsed
gauge.summary: Number of slots currently occupied in the account database cache, broken down by size class

gauge.name: CacheClassMax
gauge.summary: Total slot capacity of the account database cache, broken down by size class

gauge.name: CacheClassReserved
gauge.summary: Number of slots currently reserved by in-flight acquires (cache_class_used), or ULONG_MAX when reservation tracking is disabled for the class

gauge.name: CacheClassTargetUsed
gauge.summary: Target used-slot count for the account database cache (max - cache_free_target). When used exceeds this, the background preevict pass tries to bring used back down to this level.

gauge.name: CacheClassLowWaterUsed
gauge.summary: Used-slot count at which the background preevict pass kicks in (max - cache_free_low_water). When used exceeds this, preevicts start.

int.name: NoChild
int.label: A block fully replayed and there was no child block available yet

int.name: NoWork
int.label: A partially replayed block ran out of work to dispatch

int.name: Abandoned
int.label: A block got abandoned for any reason

int.name: Minority
int.label: A block got abandoned for being on a minority fork

gauge.name: IdentityBalanceLamports
gauge.summary: Identity account balance at the optimistically confirmed slot

gauge.name: ActiveStakeLamports
gauge.summary: Our active stake at the optimistically confirmed slot

gauge.name: ClusterActiveStakeLamports
gauge.summary: Total cluster active stake at the optimistically confirmed slot

gauge.name: EpochCredits
gauge.summary: Our vote account epoch credits at the optimistically confirmed slot

counter.name: StoreQueryAcquired
counter.summary: Store slock acquires for query

counter.name: StoreQueryReleased
counter.summary: Store slock releases for query

histogram.name: StoreQueryWaitSeconds
histogram.summary: Time spent waiting to acquire the slock for query

histogram.name: StoreQueryWorkSeconds
histogram.summary: Time spent working before releasing the slock for query

counter.name: StoreQueryMissing
counter.summary: Queries where merkle root was missing

gauge.name: StoreQueryMerkleRootSample
gauge.summary: First 8 bytes of most recently queried merkle root

gauge.name: StoreQueryMissingMerkleRootSample
gauge.summary: First 8 bytes of most recently queried missing merkle root

gauge.name: RootSlot
gauge.summary: Slot at which our node has most recently rooted

gauge.name: RootDistance
gauge.summary: Distance in slots between our current root and the current reset slot

gauge.name: LeaderSlot
gauge.summary: Slot at which we are currently leader, or 0 if none

gauge.name: NextLeaderSlot
gauge.summary: Slot at which we are next leader, or 0 if none. If we are currently leader, this is the same as the current leader slot

gauge.name: ResetSlot
gauge.summary: Slot at which we last reset the replay stage, or 0 if unknown

gauge.name: BankLiveMax
gauge.summary: Maximum number of banks we can have alive

gauge.name: BankLive
gauge.summary: Banks we currently have alive

gauge.name: ReassemblyFree
gauge.summary: Free FEC sets in the reassembly queue

gauge.name: ReassemblyLatestSlot
gauge.summary: Slot of the latest FEC set in the reassembly queue that can be replayed

gauge.name: ReassemblyLatestFecIndex
gauge.summary: FEC set index of the latest FEC set in the reassembly queue that can be replayed

gauge.name: SchedActiveBankIndex
gauge.summary: Bank that the replay scheduler is currently dispatching work for

gauge.name: SchedLastDispatchBankIndex
gauge.summary: Bank that the replay scheduler last dispatched work for

gauge.name: SchedLastDispatchTimestampNanos
gauge.summary: Timestamp when the replay scheduler last dispatched work, in nanoseconds

gauge.name: SchedStagingLaneOccupied
gauge.summary: Staging lanes currently occupied in the replay scheduler. Up to four staging lanes can be occupied at once

gauge.name: SchedStagingLaneOccupiedWatermark
gauge.summary: High watermark of staging lanes that were at one point occupied in the replay scheduler

gauge.name: SchedStagingLaneHeadBankIndex
gauge.summary: Bank at the head of each staging lane of the replay dispatcher

gauge.name: SchedTxnPoolOccupied
gauge.summary: Transactions available to be scheduled in the replay scheduler

gauge.name: SchedTxnPoolSize
gauge.summary: Maximum number of transactions the replay scheduler can consider. Fixed at Firedancer startup but a useful reference for SchedTxnPoolOccupied

gauge.name: SchedMicroblockPoolOccupied
gauge.summary: Microblocks available to be scheduled in the replay scheduler

gauge.name: SchedMicroblockPoolSize
gauge.summary: Maximum number of microblocks the replay scheduler can consider. Fixed at Firedancer startup but a useful reference for SchedMicroblockPoolOccupied

gauge.name: SchedBlockPoolOccupied
gauge.summary: Blocks alive in the replay scheduler

gauge.name: SchedBlockPoolSize
gauge.summary: Maximum number of blocks the replay scheduler can keep track of. Fixed at Firedancer startup but a useful reference for SchedBlockPoolOccupied

counter.name: SchedBlockAdded
counter.summary: Blocks added to the replay scheduler, by staging state

counter.name: SchedBlockReplayed
counter.summary: Blocks the replay scheduler considers fully replayed

counter.name: SchedBlockAbandoned
counter.summary: Blocks the replay scheduler abandoned for any reason

counter.name: SchedBlockRejected
counter.summary: Blocks the replay scheduler considers bad

counter.name: SchedBlockPromoted
counter.summary: Blocks the replay scheduler promoted from unstaged to a staging lane

counter.name: SchedBlockDemoted
counter.summary: Blocks the replay scheduler demoted from a staging lane to unstaged

counter.name: SchedDeactivate
counter.summary: Times the replay scheduler stopped dispatching, by reason

counter.name: SchedLaneSwitched
counter.summary: Times the replay scheduler switched the lane it is dispatching from

counter.name: SchedLanePromoted
counter.summary: Times the replay scheduler promoted one or more blocks onto a staging lane

counter.name: SchedLaneDemoted
counter.summary: Times the replay scheduler demoted one or more blocks from a staging lane

counter.name: SchedForkObserved
counter.summary: Forks the replay scheduler has observed

counter.name: SchedAlut
counter.summary: Transactions with address lookup tables the replay scheduler tried to expand, by outcome

counter.name: SchedTxnParsedAbandoned
counter.summary: Transactions that were parsed but ended up being in abandoned blocks

counter.name: SchedTxnExecutedAbandoned
counter.summary: Transactions that were executed but ended up being in abandoned blocks

counter.name: SchedTxnDoneAbandoned
counter.summary: Transactions that were fully replayed but ended up being in abandoned blocks

counter.name: SchedWeightedInFlight
counter.summary: Cumulative transactions in-flight from the replay scheduler's point of view, weighted by the duration of each transaction. Useful as the dividend for SchedWeightedInFlightDurationNanos

counter.name: SchedWeightedInFlightDurationNanos
counter.summary: Duration over which SchedWeightedInFlight was accumulated, in nanoseconds. Use as divisor to get the average number of in-flight transactions

counter.name: SchedNoneInFlightDurationNanos
counter.summary: Duration the replay scheduler had no transaction in-flight, in nanoseconds. Useful in a ratio against SchedWeightedInFlightDurationNanos to see how often the replay transaction execution pipeline was idle

counter.name: SchedTxnParsed
counter.summary: Transactions the replay pipeline has parsed

counter.name: SchedTxnExecuted
counter.summary: Transactions the replay pipeline has executed

counter.name: SchedTxnSignatureVerified
counter.summary: Transactions the replay pipeline has sigverified

counter.name: SchedTxnPohMixed
counter.summary: Transactions the replay pipeline has performed PoH mixin on

counter.name: SchedTxnDone
counter.summary: Transactions that were fully replayed

counter.name: SchedMicroblockParsed
counter.summary: Microblocks the replay pipeline has parsed

counter.name: SchedMicroblockHashed
counter.summary: Microblocks the replay pipeline has fully hashed

counter.name: SchedMicroblockDone
counter.summary: Microblocks that were fully replayed

counter.name: SchedBytesIngested
counter.summary: Bytes the replay scheduler has ingested

counter.name: SchedBytesIngestedPadding
counter.summary: Bytes the replay scheduler ingested but did not parse for being padding

counter.name: SchedBytesDropped
counter.summary: Bytes the replay scheduler refused to ingest because the block is considered abandoned

counter.name: SchedFecIngested
counter.summary: FEC sets the replay scheduler has been given

counter.name: SlotReplayed
counter.summary: Slots replayed successfully or leader slots packed and shredded successfully

counter.name: TxnProcessed
counter.summary: Transactions processed overall on the current fork

counter.name: FecSchedFull
counter.summary: Times sched is full and a FEC set can't be processed

counter.name: FecReassemblyEmpty
counter.summary: Times reassembly is empty and a FEC set can't be processed

counter.name: FecLeaderBidWait
counter.summary: Times replay is blocked by the PoH tile not sending an end of leader message

counter.name: FecBankFull
counter.summary: Times banks are full and a FEC set can't be processed

counter.name: StorageRootBehind
counter.summary: Times the storage root is behind the consensus root and can't be advanced

counter.name: ProgcacheRooted
counter.summary: Program cache entries rooted

counter.name: ProgcacheGcRoot
counter.summary: Number of program cache entries garbage collected while rooting

gauge.name: ProgcacheFreePartition
gauge.summary: Free program cache heap partitions (indicates fragmentation)

gauge.name: ProgcacheFreeBytes
gauge.summary: Free bytes in the program cache heap

gauge.name: ProgcacheSizeBytes
gauge.summary: Total size of the program cache heap

gauge.name: ProgcacheFreePartitionMaxBytes
gauge.summary: Largest free heap partition in program cache

gauge.name: ProgcacheUsedPartitionMedianBytes
gauge.summary: Median used heap partition size in program cache

gauge.name: ProgcacheUsedPartitionMeanBytes
gauge.summary: Mean used heap partition size in program cache

counter.name: ProgcacheDurationSeconds
counter.summary: Time spent doing program cache tasks, in seconds

counter.name: AccdbAccountAcquired
counter.summary: Number of accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountWritableAcquired
counter.summary: Number of writable accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountEvicted
counter.summary: Number of accounts evicted from the account database cache to make space, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedNew
counter.summary: Number of new (non-overwrite) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedOverwrite
counter.summary: Number of overwrite (existing fork+generation) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountNotFound
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were not found in the account database cache, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountWaited
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were concurrently loading into cache by another transaction, causing the transaction to wait

counter.name: AccdbBatchAcquired
counter.summary: Number of fd_accdb_acquire (batch acquire) calls made by this tile

counter.name: AccdbAcquireFailed
counter.summary: Number of times we failed to acquire the cache lines needed for a transaction, and had to spin loop waiting

counter.name: AccdbBytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: AccdbReadOperation
counter.summary: Number of read operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesWritten
counter.summary: Number of bytes written to the account database

counter.name: AccdbWriteOperation
counter.summary: Number of write operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesCopied
counter.summary: Number of bytes copied within the account database

histogram.name: RootAccountDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Time spent updating the rooted account store (one sample per block, normalized by account count)

counter.name: RootDurationSeconds
counter.summary: Time spent rooting accounts, in seconds

gauge.name: RuntimeStatus
gauge.summary: 0=initializing, 1=loaded

counter.name: PktTx
counter.summary: Network packets sent, including reqs, pings, pongs, etc

counter.name: RequestTx
counter.summary: Client messages sent, by type

gauge.name: SlotHighestRepaired
gauge.summary: Highest slot up to which we have fully repaired

gauge.name: SlotCurrent
gauge.summary: Our view of the current cluster slot, max slot received

counter.name: ShredOld
counter.summary: Shreds received that were older than the root

gauge.name: SlotLastRequested
gauge.summary: Last slot we requested a single shred for

gauge.name: OrphanLastRequested
gauge.summary: Last slot we requested an orphan for

gauge.name: RequestInflight
gauge.summary: Requests currently in the inflight queue, excluding orphans and highest window requests

counter.name: PeerRequested
counter.summary: Peers requested

counter.name: SignTileUnavailable
counter.summary: Times no sign tiles were available to send a request

counter.name: EagerThresholdExceeded
counter.summary: Times we passed the eager repair threshold

counter.name: ShredRerequested
counter.summary: Times we re-requested a shred from the inflights queue

counter.name: PingMalformed
counter.summary: Malformed pings received

counter.name: PingUnknownPeer
counter.summary: Pings received from an unknown peer

counter.name: PingSignatureFailed
counter.summary: Pings whose signature we failed to verify

histogram.name: SlotCompleteDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Time it took to complete a slot

histogram.name: ResponseLatencyNanos
histogram.summary: Time it took to receive a repair request response, in nanoseconds

histogram.name: SignDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of signing a message

counter.name: BlockEvicted
counter.summary: Blocks evicted from the forest

counter.name: BlockInsertFailed
counter.summary: Blocks we failed to insert into the forest due to failed eviction

gauge.name: SlotLastEvicted
gauge.summary: Most recent slot evicted from forest

gauge.name: SlotLastEvictionCause
gauge.summary: Slot that caused the most recent eviction from forest

gauge.name: SlotLastInsertFailed
gauge.summary: Most recent slot we failed to insert into the forest

counter.name: ChainVerifyFailed
counter.summary: Times any block failed chained merkle verification

gauge.name: SlotLastChainVerifyFailed
gauge.summary: Most recent slot that failed chained merkle verification

counter.name: ReceivedRequestCount
counter.summary: Total repair requests received by type, before any validation

counter.name: ReceivedRequestBytes
counter.summary: Total bytes of incoming repair request payloads

counter.name: ReceivedMalformedCount
counter.summary: Packets dropped for being malformed, broken down by reason

counter.name: TotalPktCount
counter.summary: How many network packets we have sent, including pings, responses, etc

counter.name: SentResponseTypes
counter.summary: What types of response messages are we sending

counter.name: SentResponseBytes
counter.summary: Total payload bytes sent in response packets

counter.name: SentPingBackCount
counter.summary: How many ping-back packets we sent to nodes not yet in the ping cache

counter.name: MissedResponseTypes
counter.summary: What types of response messages could we not fulfill

counter.name: FailedSigverify
counter.summary: How many times we failed to verify the signature of a request

counter.name: FailedOwnKey
counter.summary: How many requests we've received that were sent by us

counter.name: FailedInvalidToken
counter.summary: How many pong requests we've received with outdated or invalid tokens

counter.name: FailedNotForUs
counter.summary: How many requests we've received that were not intended for us

counter.name: FailedOutdated
counter.summary: How many requests we've received that had outdated timestamps

counter.name: FailedInvalidShredIndex
counter.summary: How many requests we've received that had invalid shred indices

counter.name: FailedPingCacheLookup
counter.summary: Requests from nodes not in the ping cache, which triggered a ping-back instead of a response

gauge.name: ShredsCurrent
gauge.summary: The number of shreds currently in the shreds database

gauge.name: ShredsMax
gauge.summary: Total capacity of shreds that can be stored in the shreds database

gauge.name: DiskCurrentBytes
gauge.summary: The number of bytes currently used on disk by the database

gauge.name: DiskAllocatedBytes
gauge.summary: The current size of the database file on disk

counter.name: PingCacheEntries
counter.summary: How many active entries do we have in the ping cache

counter.name: PingCacheEvictions
counter.summary: How many entries we've evicted from the ping cache

int.name: Staked
int.label: Pong ignored as node is staked

int.name: Entrypoint
int.label: Pong ignored as node is an entrypoint

int.name: Untracked
int.label: Pong ignored as node has no outstanding ping

int.name: Address
int.label: Pong ignored as responding node doesn't match pinged address

int.name: Token
int.label: Pong ignored as token was not valid

int.name: Unpinged
int.label: Peer is known but has not been pinged yet

int.name: Invalid
int.label: Peer was pinged but has not yet responded, or responded with an invalid pong

int.name: Valid
int.label: Peer was pinged and is currently valid

int.name: ValidRefreshing
int.label: Peer was pinged and is currently valid, and is being refreshed with a new ping

int.name: DroppedPullResponseStale
int.label: Pull Response (newer entry already present in table)

int.name: DroppedPushStale
int.label: Push (newer entry already present in table)

gauge.name: PingTrackerCapacity
gauge.summary: Peer tracking capacity of the ping tracker

gauge.name: PingTracked
gauge.summary: Peers being tracked for ping/pong

counter.name: PingTrackerPongResult
counter.summary: Result of processing a pong response to a ping

counter.name: PingTrackerEvicted
counter.summary: Peers evicted from the ping tracker to make space for new peers

counter.name: PingTrackerAdded
counter.summary: Peers ever tracked for ping/pong

counter.name: PingTrackerStakeChanged
counter.summary: Times a tracked peer was removed from tracking because it became staked

counter.name: PingTrackerAddressChanged
counter.summary: Times a tracked peer was removed from tracking because its gossip address changed

gauge.name: CrdsCapacity
gauge.summary: Capacity of the data store

gauge.name: CrdsOccupied
gauge.summary: Entries in the data store

counter.name: CrdsExpired
counter.summary: Entries expired from the data store due to age

counter.name: CrdsEvicted
counter.summary: Entries evicted from the data store to make space for new entries

gauge.summary: Capacity for storing peers in the data store

gauge.summary: Staked peers in the data store

gauge.name: CrdsPeerUnstaked
gauge.summary: Unstaked peers in the data store

gauge.name: CrdsPeerStake

counter.name: CrdsPeerEvicted
counter.summary: Peers evicted from the data store to make space for new peers

counter.name: CrdsPurgedEvicted
counter.summary: Purged entries evicted from the data store to make space for new entries

counter.summary: CRDS values sent in push messages

counter.summary: Wire bytes of CRDS sent in push messages

counter.name: CrdsPullResponseTx

counter.name: CrdsPullResponseTxBytes
counter.summary: Wire bytes of CRDS sent in pull response messages

gauge.summary: Staked peers with recent gossip activity

gauge.name: WaitForSupermajorityStakedPeerTotal
gauge.summary: Staked peers being tracked

gauge.name: WaitForSupermajorityStakeOnline
gauge.summary: Lamports of stake from peers with recent gossip activity

gauge.name: WaitForSupermajorityStakeTotal
gauge.summary: Total lamports of stake being tracked

gauge.summary: 1=init, 2=wait, 3=publish, 4=done

counter.summary: Wire bytes of gossip messages processed

counter.name: CrdsRx

counter.summary: Wire bytes of CRDS values processed

histogram.name: SignDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration of signing a message

counter.name: EventDropped
counter.summary: Netlink drop events caught

counter.name: LinkFullSync
counter.summary: Full link table syncs done

counter.name: RouteFullSync
counter.summary: Full route table syncs done

counter.name: UpdateProcessed
counter.summary: Netlink live updates processed

gauge.name: InterfaceCount
gauge.summary: Network interfaces

gauge.name: RouteCount
gauge.summary: IPv4 routes

counter.name: NeighborProbeSent
counter.summary: Neighbor solicit requests sent to kernel

counter.name: NeighborProbeFailed
counter.summary: Neighbor solicit requests that failed to send (kernel too slow)

counter.name: NeighborProbeRateLimitHost
counter.summary: Neighbor solicit requests that exceeded the per-host rate limit

counter.name: NeighborProbeRateLimitGlobal
counter.summary: Neighbor solicit requests that exceeded the global rate limit

gauge.name: State
gauge.summary: 0=init, 1=waiting for peers, 2=waiting for peers (incremental), 3=collecting peers, 4=collecting peers (incremental), 5=reading full file, 6=flushing full file fini, 7=flushing full file done, 8=flushing full file reset, 9=reading incremental file, 10=flushing incremental file fini, 11=flushing incremental file done, 12=flushing incremental file reset, 13=reading full http, 14=flushing full http fini, 15=flushing full http done, 16=flushing full http reset, 17=reading incremental http, 18=flushing incremental http fini, 19=flushing incremental http done, 20=flushing incremental http reset, 21=shutdown

gauge.name: FullBytesRead
gauge.summary: Bytes read so far from the full snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: FullBytesWritten
gauge.summary: Bytes written so far from the full snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: FullSizeBytes
gauge.summary: Total size of the full snapshot file. Might change if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: FullRetry
gauge.summary: Retries of the full snapshot download so far because the peer was too slow

gauge.name: IncrementalBytesRead
gauge.summary: Bytes read so far from the incremental snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalBytesWritten
gauge.summary: Bytes written so far from the incremental snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalSizeBytes
gauge.summary: Total size of the incremental snapshot file. Might change if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalRetry
gauge.summary: Retries of the incremental snapshot download so far because the peer was too slow

gauge.name: PredictedSlot
gauge.summary: Predicted slot from which replay starts after snapshot loading finishes. Might change if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

counter.name: SslAllocFailed
counter.summary: SSL allocation errors encountered

gauge.name: State
gauge.summary: 0=idle, 1=processing, 2=finishing, 3=error, 4=shutdown

counter.name: SslAllocFailed
counter.summary: SSL allocation errors encountered

gauge.name: State
gauge.summary: 0=idle, 1=processing, 2=finishing, 3=error, 4=shutdown

gauge.name: FullCompressedBytesRead
gauge.summary: Bytes read so far from the compressed full snapshot file. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: FullDecompressedBytesWritten
gauge.summary: Bytes decompressed so far from the full snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalCompressedBytesRead
gauge.summary: Bytes read so far from the compressed incremental snapshot file. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalDecompressedBytesWritten
gauge.summary: Bytes decompressed so far from the incremental snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: State
gauge.summary: 0=idle, 1=processing, 2=finishing, 3=error, 4=shutdown

gauge.name: FullBytesRead
gauge.summary: Bytes read so far from the full snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalBytesRead
gauge.summary: Bytes read so far from the incremental snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: AccountLoaded
gauge.summary: Accounts seen during snapshot loading. Includes duplicates. Resets if snapshot load restarts

gauge.name: AccountReplaced
gauge.summary: Previously inserted accounts replaced by a later duplicate. Resets if snapshot load restarts

gauge.name: AccountIgnored
gauge.summary: Stale duplicate accounts dropped because a previously inserted account was newer. Resets if snapshot load restarts

counter.name: AccountProcessed
counter.summary: Accounts processed across all snapshots (inserted or otherwise)

counter.name: AccountBatchProcessed
counter.summary: Account batches processed across all snapshots (parallelism indicator)

gauge.name: FullBytesRead
gauge.summary: Number of decompressed snapshot bytes consumed from the full snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: IncrementalBytesRead
gauge.summary: Number of decompressed snapshot bytes consumed from the incremental snapshot. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: BytesWritten
gauge.summary: Number of bytes written to the accounts database on disk. Monotonically increasing across snapshot loads.

gauge.name: AccountsWritten
gauge.summary: Number of accounts written to the accounts database on disk. Might decrease if snapshot load is aborted and restarted

gauge.name: BootTimestampNanos
gauge.summary: Timestamp when validator was started, in nanoseconds since epoch

gauge.name: ConnActive
gauge.summary: Active HTTP connections to the Prometheus endpoint

counter.name: BytesWritten
counter.summary: Bytes written to all responses on the Prometheus endpoint

counter.name: BytesRead
counter.summary: Bytes read from all requests to the Prometheus endpoint

histogram.name: RequestDurationSeconds
histogram.summary: Duration spent in service

counter.name: RequestServed
counter.summary: Number of RPC requests served

gauge.name: ConnActive
gauge.summary: The number of active HTTP connections to the RPC service

gauge.name: WebsocketConnActive
gauge.summary: The number of active WebSocket connections to the RPC service

gauge.name: WebsocketSubscriptionActive
gauge.summary: The number of active WebSocket subscriptions to the RPC service, broken down by subscription type

counter.name: WebsocketEventUniqueSent
counter.summary: Number of unique WebSocket events sent by the RPC service

counter.name: WebsocketEventSent
counter.summary: Number of WebSocket events sent by the RPC service across all subscriptions

counter.name: AccdbAccountAcquired
counter.summary: Number of accounts read from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountNotFound
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were not found in the account database cache and had to be read from disk, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountWaited
counter.summary: Number of accounts that had to wait for a concurrent writer to publish a disk offset before being read

counter.name: AccdbBatchAcquired
counter.summary: Number of fd_accdb_acquire (batch acquire) calls made by this tile

counter.name: AccdbBytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: AccdbReadOperation
counter.summary: Number of read operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesCopied
counter.summary: Number of bytes copied out of the account database cache on a cache hit

int.name: Other
int.label: e.g. TIMER, HRTIMER, IRQ_POLL, TASKLET, SCHED, RCU, ...

gauge.name: BundleStatus
gauge.summary: Precise status of the bundle subsystem: 0=disabled (no bundle tiles configured), 1=disconnected (all bundle tiles disconnected), 2=connecting (at least one bundle tile connecting, none connected or sleeping), 3=connected (at least one bundle tile connected), 4=sleeping (at least one bundle tile sleeping, none connected)

gauge.name: VoteStatus
gauge.summary: Precise status of the vote subsystem: 0=disabled (non-voting or no tower tile), 1=not started (tower tile not running or no votes cast yet), 2=delinquent (vote distance exceeds threshold or vote stalled), 3=voting (voting normally)

gauge.name: ReplayStatus
gauge.summary: Precise status of the replay subsystem: 0=disabled (no replay tile), 1=not started (replay tile not running or slots are zero), 2=behind (replay lagging behind turbine or reset slot stalled), 3=running (replay keeping up)

gauge.name: TurbineStatus
gauge.summary: Precise status of the turbine subsystem: 0=disabled (no shred or replay tiles), 1=not started (tiles not all running or turbine slot is zero), 2=stalled (turbine slot not advancing), 3=repair outpacing (repair byte throughput exceeds turbine), 4=running (turbine receiving normally)

counter.name: DeviceIrq
counter.summary: Number of device IRQs across all CPUs

counter.name: DeviceIrqUndesired
counter.summary: Number of device hard IRQs that stole CPU time from fixed tiles

counter.name: Softirq
counter.summary: Number of soft-IRQs across all CPUs

counter.name: SoftirqUndesired
counter.summary: Number of soft-IRQs that stole CPU time from fixed tiles

gauge.name: CurrentShredVersion
gauge.summary: Current shred version used by the validator

gauge.name: ConnActive
gauge.summary: Active connections to the ipecho service

counter.name: ConnClosed
counter.summary: Connections to the ipecho service made and closed, by outcome

counter.name: BytesRead
counter.summary: Bytes read from all connections to the ipecho service

counter.name: BytesWritten
counter.summary: Bytes written to all connections to the ipecho service

gauge.name: FinalSlot
gauge.summary: Slot after which the backtest will complete

gauge.name: StartSlot
gauge.summary: Slot at which the backtest started

gauge.name: Processing
gauge.summary: Whether the tile is currently processing a task (executing, sigverifying, or PoH hashing), either 1 or 0

counter.name: TxnResult
counter.summary: Result of loading and executing a transaction

counter.name: SignatureVerified
counter.summary: Ed25519 signature verification jobs executed

counter.name: PohHashed
counter.summary: PoH SHA-256 calls executed

counter.name: TxnRegimeDurationNanos
counter.summary: Mutually exclusive and exhaustive duration spent in transaction execution regimes, in nanoseconds

counter.name: VmRegimeDurationNanos
counter.summary: Mutually exclusive and exhaustive duration spent in virtual machine execution regimes, in nanoseconds

counter.name: CuExecuted
counter.summary: Estimated compute units executed since tile start

counter.name: ProgcacheLookup
counter.summary: Program cache lookups

counter.name: ProgcacheHit
counter.summary: Program cache hits

counter.name: ProgcacheMiss
counter.summary: Program cache misses

counter.name: ProgcacheOomHeap
counter.summary: Program cache out-of-memory events (heap)

counter.name: ProgcacheOomDesc
counter.summary: Program cache out-of-memory events (descriptor table)

counter.name: ProgcacheFill
counter.summary: Program cache insertions

counter.name: ProgcacheFillBytes
counter.summary: Bytes inserted into program cache

counter.name: ProgcacheSpill
counter.summary: Program cache spills (OOM fallback mechanism)

counter.name: ProgcacheSpillBytes
counter.summary: Bytes spilled from program cache (OOM fallback mechanism)

counter.name: ProgcacheEviction
counter.summary: Program cache evictions

counter.name: ProgcacheEvictionBytes
counter.summary: Bytes evicted from program cache

counter.name: ProgcacheDurationSeconds
counter.summary: Time spent on program cache operations, in seconds

counter.name: ProgcacheLoadDurationSeconds
counter.summary: Time spent loading programs, in seconds

counter.name: AccdbAccountAcquired
counter.summary: Number of accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountWritableAcquired
counter.summary: Number of writable accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountEvicted
counter.summary: Number of accounts evicted from the account database cache to make space, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedNew
counter.summary: Number of new (non-overwrite) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedOverwrite
counter.summary: Number of overwrite (existing fork+generation) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountNotFound
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were not found in the account database cache, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountWaited
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were concurrently loading into cache by another transaction, causing the transaction to wait

counter.name: AccdbBatchAcquired
counter.summary: Number of fd_accdb_acquire (batch acquire) calls made by this tile

counter.name: AccdbAcquireFailed
counter.summary: Number of times we failed to acquire the cache lines needed for a transaction, and had to spin loop waiting

counter.name: AccdbBytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: AccdbReadOperation
counter.summary: Number of read operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesWritten
counter.summary: Number of bytes written to the account database

counter.name: AccdbWriteOperation
counter.summary: Number of write operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesCopied
counter.summary: Number of bytes copied within the account database

counter.name: TxnTx
counter.summary: Benchmark transactions sent

int.name: AlreadyVoted
int.label: Slot was not newer than previous vote

int.name: Success
int.label: Vote was counted, no hard fork agreement reached

int.name: SuccessMatched
int.label: 52%+ of stake agreed on our bank hash

int.name: Mismatched
int.label: 52%+ of stake agreed on a different bank hash than ours (we hard forked)

int.name: AlreadyVoted
int.label: Voter already voted for this block_id

int.name: NoVoteNotRecent
int.label: Haven't voted yet and best block is not recent enough to vote (can't vote)

int.name: EmptyTowerVote
int.label: Haven't voted yet, voting for best block (can vote)

int.name: AncestorRollback
int.label: Rollback to an ancestor of our prev vote (can't vote)

int.name: SameFork
int.label: Same fork as prev vote (can vote)

int.name: SwitchPass
int.label: Prev vote was on a different fork, but we are allowed to switch (can vote)

int.name: SwitchFail
int.label: Prev vote was on a different fork, and we are not allowed to switch (can't vote)

int.name: Voted
int.label: Passed all vote checks and cast a vote

int.name: ThresholdFail
int.label: Did not pass threshold check (can't vote)

int.name: PropagatedFail
int.label: Prev leader block did not propagate (can't vote)

int.name: NoCandidate
int.label: Fork decision did not produce a votable block

int.name: Success
int.label: Vote txn passed per-txn validation and reached slot counting (per-slot outcomes tracked by VoteSlotResult)

int.name: NotSimpleVote
int.label: Txn was not a simple vote transaction

int.name: NotTowerSync
int.label: Vote txn was not a TowerSync instruction

int.name: EmptyTower
int.label: Vote txn had an empty tower (validator hasn't voted)

int.name: BadTower
int.label: Vote txn deserialized but tower was invalid

int.name: UnknownBlockId
int.label: Last vote had a null block id

int.name: TooOld
int.label: Last vote slot was behind the votes root

int.name: NotStaked
int.label: Unable to query stake for vote slot

int.name: BadSigner
int.label: Vote txn was not signed by the authorized voter for the vote account at the vote epoch

int.name: TooNew
int.label: Vote slot was too far ahead of the votes root

int.name: UnknownVoter
int.label: Vote account was not in the voter set

int.name: AlreadyVoted
int.label: Voter already voted for this slot

int.name: TooOld
int.label: Vote slot was behind the votes root

int.name: UnknownSlot
int.label: Vote slot was for a slot we haven't replayed

int.name: Proceed
int.label: Last vote slot was replayed and matched, intermediate vote slots will be counted

int.name: UnknownSlot
int.label: Last vote slot was not replayed, intermediate vote slots skipped

int.name: UnknownBlockId
int.label: Last vote slot block id did not match, intermediate vote slots skipped

counter.name: FragIgnored
counter.summary: replay_slot_completed frags we ignored

gauge.name: SlotLastIgnored
gauge.summary: Most recent ignored replay_slot_completed frag

counter.name: FragEqvocDetected
counter.summary: replay_slot_completed frags we detect as equivocations

gauge.name: SlotLastEqvoc
gauge.summary: Most recent equivocating replay_slot_completed frag

gauge.name: ReplaySlot
gauge.summary: Most recently replayed slot, ULONG_MAX if nothing replayed yet. Not monotonically increasing

gauge.name: VoteSlot
gauge.summary: Highest voted slot in the local tower, ULONG_MAX if haven't voted. Monotonically increasing

gauge.name: ResetSlot
gauge.summary: Most recent reset slot, ULONG_MAX if no reset yet. Not monotonically increasing

gauge.name: RootSlot
gauge.summary: Highest rooted slot, ULONG_MAX if no root yet. Monotonically increasing

gauge.name: InitSlot
gauge.summary: Init slot, either the snapshot or genesis slot. Set once and does not change

counter.name: FragNotReadyDropped
counter.summary: Frags dropped because they arrived before the tower tile was initialized

counter.name: EqvocProof
counter.summary: Equivocation proofs, by validation outcome

counter.name: GhostVote
counter.summary: Result of counting a vote towards ghost

counter.name: HardForkVote
counter.summary: Result of counting a vote towards hard fork detection

gauge.name: HardForkMatchedSlot
gauge.summary: Highest slot where 52%+ of stake agreed on our bank hash

gauge.name: HardForkMismatchedSlot
gauge.summary: Highest slot where 52%+ of stake agreed on a different bank hash than ours (we hard forked)

counter.name: ForkDecision
counter.summary: Result of deciding which fork to vote/reset on

counter.name: VoteGate
counter.summary: Result of the vote gating checks after a fork was selected

counter.name: VoteTxn
counter.summary: Result of processing a vote txn (per txn)

counter.name: VoteSlotCounted
counter.summary: Result of counting an individual vote slot from a vote txn (per slot)

counter.name: VoteIntermediateGate
counter.summary: Whether the last vote slot's replay state allowed counting the intermediate vote slots (per txn that reached slot counting)

counter.name: AccdbAccountAcquired
counter.summary: Number of accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountWritableAcquired
counter.summary: Number of writable accounts acquired from the account database, attributed to the cache size class of the account's current data size

counter.name: AccdbAccountEvicted
counter.summary: Number of accounts evicted from the account database cache to make space, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedNew
counter.summary: Number of new (non-overwrite) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountCommittedOverwrite
counter.summary: Number of overwrite (existing fork+generation) account versions committed to the index, broken down by destination cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountNotFound
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were not found in the account database cache, broken down by cache size class

counter.name: AccdbAccountWaited
counter.summary: Number of accounts that were needed for transaction execution but were concurrently loading into cache by another transaction, causing the transaction to wait

counter.name: AccdbBatchAcquired
counter.summary: Number of fd_accdb_acquire (batch acquire) calls made by this tile

counter.name: AccdbAcquireFailed
counter.summary: Number of times we failed to acquire the cache lines needed for a transaction, and had to spin loop waiting

counter.name: AccdbBytesRead
counter.summary: Number of bytes read from the account database

counter.name: AccdbReadOperation
counter.summary: Number of read operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesWritten
counter.summary: Number of bytes written to the account database

counter.name: AccdbWriteOperation
counter.summary: Number of write operations performed on the account database

counter.name: AccdbBytesCopied
counter.summary: Number of bytes copied within the account database

gauge.summary: Active HTTP connections to the GUI service, excluding connections that have been upgraded to a WebSocket connection

gauge.summary: Active WebSocket connections to the GUI service

counter.summary: WebSocket frames sent to all connections to the GUI service

counter.name: WebsocketFrameRx
counter.summary: WebSocket frames received from all connections to the GUI service

counter.summary: Bytes read from all connections to the GUI service

gauge.name: QueueDepth

gauge.name: QueueUnsent
gauge.summary: Events in the event queue not yet sent to the event service

counter.name: QueueDropped
counter.summary: Events dropped because the event queue was full

gauge.name: QueueBytesUsed
